createTable.remarks: Working Copy mirror of DW_RULE: whole proposed Rule rows staged for publish; sparse, a row exists only for a changed or new Rule

column.name: id
column.remarks: Primary key; equals the master Rule id for an edited Rule, or a generated id for a Working-Copy-only Rule

column.name: recommendation_id
column.remarks: Proposed recommendation reference; resolved against master union Working Copy, not a foreign key

column.name: trigger_ingredient_id
column.remarks: Proposed trigger ingredient reference; resolved against master union Working Copy, not a foreign key

column.name: role_or_technique_id
column.remarks: Proposed role or technique reference; optional, resolved against master union Working Copy, not a foreign key

column.name: version
column.remarks: Working Copy optimistic-concurrency version; incremented on each staged change to this row
